title: Silly Swap Words
description: A phoneme-substitution build game where kids swap one onset or rime tile to make a new word.
learningGoals: Hear that one changed sound can make a new word
Build short CVC words with shared letter tiles
interactionModel: build-assemble drag or tap-tap letter tiles into two ghost slots
feedbackModel: Correct tiles pop, sparkle, and speak their sound; misses wiggle gently with a spoken nudge and retry. Finished words speak the transformation line.

modes.title: Swap a Sound
modes.skill: phoneme substitution with one changed sound

modes.title: Word Chains
modes.skill: hearing a sequence of small word changes

credits: Kaigani; shared QLOBE Kids letter-tile art and synthesized runtime SFX. Built with Codex for QLOBE Kids.
